summary: The headers downloader task divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in channel-closed Poll::Ready exits; no spawned header downloader behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 137: M	crates/net/downloaders/src/headers/task.rs.
The isolated patch only changes three `return Poll::Ready(())` expressions to semicolon-terminated forms.
No downloader update handling, header forwarding, channel-closed handling, pending behavior, or task exit condition changed.
